summary: PipelinePage Refactoring Regression Test Complete - All 12 features verified. The refactoring from 921-line monolith to 6 extracted components (KanbanBoard, PriorityBoard, PipelineStyles, UpcomingTasksSection, CommittedBanner, pipeline-constants) works correctly with no functional changes.
critical_code_review_comments: PipelinePage.js now 279 lines - clean orchestration with proper imports from extracted components
KanbanBoard.js (213 lines): KanbanCard + KanbanBoard properly extracted with drag-and-drop via @hello-pangea/dnd
PriorityBoard.js (95 lines): PriorityCard + PriorityBoard with 3 sections (attention, coming-up, on-track) and empty states
PipelineStyles.js (73 lines): CSS-in-JS animations (kanban-card, insert-line, col-pulse, settle) properly extracted
UpcomingTasksSection.js (52 lines): Tasks section with proper filtering (source !== 'coach')
CommittedBanner.js (31 lines): Committed programs banner with gradient styling
pipeline-constants.js (61 lines): Shared KANBAN_COLS, COL_TO_STAGE, ATTENTION_META, helper functions
All data-testid attributes preserved for testability
Dead code properly removed: MeasurablesGuidanceBanner, DIV_TAG_STYLES, PipelineHealthBadge import, healthMap state
context_for_next_testing_agent: PipelinePage refactoring verified. All 6 extracted components work correctly: (1) KanbanBoard renders with 5 columns and drag-drop, (2) PriorityBoard renders with 3 sections, (3) PipelineStyles injects CSS animations, (4) UpcomingTasksSection conditionally renders, (5) CommittedBanner conditionally renders, (6) pipeline-constants shared properly. View toggle animation (pm-view-exit/enter/idle) works. Summary chips show counts correctly. Hero carousel with peek row works. Timeline renders items due within 3 days.
